title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 6.24.2025
summary:
Main
Capesize Spike Fades as Market Balance Loosens - The recent rally that pushed spot Capesize rates to the $30,000 mark is beginning to lose steam,
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2025-06-24_breakwave-dry-bulk-shipping-report-6-24-2025_breakwavedryjune242025report_2eb4abe193b1.pdf

[Page 1]
Dry Bulk Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
June 24, 2025
• Capesize Spike Fades as Market Balance Loosens - The recent rally that pushed
Short-term Indicators
spot Capesize rates to the $30,000 mark is beginning to lose steam, with signs of
Momentum: Neutral
weakness emerging in the Pacific market. Simultaneously, the previously
overheated Atlantic basin is now experiencing an increase in vessel availability Sentiment: Negative
for July loading dates. These developments have long been anticipated by the Fundamentals: Neutral
freight futures market, which has notably not mirrored the surge in spot rates to the
same extent.
